name: @slop-ai/discovery
description: SLOP discovery layer — discover, connect, and control local and browser applications. Main export is host-agnostic; optional `@slop-ai/discovery/anthropic-agent-sdk` wraps the Anthropic Claude Agent SDK.

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts src/anthropic-agent-sdk.ts src/cli.ts --outdir dist --format esm --target node --external '@slop-ai/consumer' --external '@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk' --external '@modelcontextprotocol/sdk' --external 'zod' --external 'ws' && bunx tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist
scripts.build:bundle: bun build src/cli.ts --outfile dist/cli.bundle.js --format esm --target node
